prompt: Create a cinematic vertical fashion portrait of a young woman with long dark wavy hair standing in a lush rose garden at golden hour, captured mid-turn as if dancing. She wears a flowing translucent crimson red chiffon dress with off-shoulder styling and long sheer fabric panels; the fabric billows dramatically to the right and around her body, backlit so the gauze glows orange-red. Her face is intentionally obscured by a smooth rectangular skin-toned privacy block with no facial features. Surround her with exactly 4 main visible rose categories: blooming red roses in the lower foreground, red roses on bushes at midground left and right, scattered airborne red petals across the upper sky, and soft blurred red flowers near the bottom edge. Use warm sunset sunlight from the upper left, strong rim light on hair, dreamy lens flare, shallow depth of field, soft bokeh greenery, romantic atmospheric haze, high-detail realistic photography, dynamic wind motion, elegant sensual pose with shoulders and back partially visible, no text, no watermark, no extra people. Set the mood to quiet passion, romantic and poetic, with a rich red-and-gold color palette and an editorial fine-art look.
